query:
SELECT
                COUNT(*) AS "plays!: i64",
                COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN finish_reason = 'skip' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "skips!: i64",
                COALESCE(SUM(listen_ms), 0) AS "listen_ms!: i64",
                MAX(started_at) AS "last_played_at?: i64"
               FROM plays WHERE ns = ? AND song_value = ?
